A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LA VENA WARD, CSR#7077. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff in Propria Persona for failure to Arbitrate is heard this day. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: La Vena Ward, CSR#7077. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2009 Continued To Aug-20-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff in Propria Persona Jorge Cornejo for failure to arbitrate is heard this day. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 8/20/2009 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Kent Gubbine, CSR#5797. (212)
